summary: Excellent late‑1992 soundboard recording featuring a sweet‑sounding Jerry and a spot‑on drums > space segment.
review: The show is praised as an all‑around excellent performance from late 1992, with Jerry Garcia’s guitar described as ‘really sweet sounding’ throughout. The soundboard recording is noted as great, and even the typically hit‑or‑miss drums‑>​space passage “hits the mark,” making this a gem of the year.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed five‑star review highlights both outstanding musical performance and high‑quality soundboard recording, warranting a near‑top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, well‑balanced soundboard capture praised as great with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Tight and engaging throughout; the performance maintains high energy from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sweet‑sounding guitar tone noted throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums > Space segment highlighted as hitting the mark.
